Summary Passionate Software Engineer with 4 years of experience specializing in Python 
backend development. Recently pivoted to focusing on Generative AI and building RAG systems. 
Dedicated to writing clean, maintainable code and solving complex architectural problems. 
Experience 
Backend Developer | PySystems Inc. Jan 2022 – Present

• Integrated OpenAI’s GPT-4 API to create a customer support chatbot, automating 40% of 
incoming queries. 
• Managed PostgreSQL databases and implemented complex queries for data analytics. 
• Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews.

• Assisted in migrating legacy PHP applications to Python/Django. 
• Wrote scripts to automate data scraping and processing tasks. 
• Collaborated with the frontend team to integrate RESTful APIs. 
Projects 
SmartDoc Search (Personal Project) 
• Built a document search engine using LangChain and ChromaDB. 
• Implemented a hybrid retrieval strategy combining keyword search and semantic search. 
• Deployed the application using Docker and Streamlit. 
Skills 
• Languages: Python, JavaScript, SQL. 
• Frameworks: FastAPI, Django, Flask, LangChain, LangGraph. 
• Tools: Docker, Git, Redis, PostgreSQL. 
• AI/ML: RAG, Vector Databases, Prompt Engineering. 
Education 
• B.Sc. Computer Science, Cairo University (2020)

Title: Senior Python Engineer (AI & Backend)
Company: TechNova Solutions

About Us:
TechNova is building the next generation of HR automation tools. We are looking for a backend engineer who is passionate about Large Language Models and building scalable agentic systems.

Responsibilities:

Design and build scalable backend services using Python and FastAPI.

Develop and orchestrate AI agents using LangChain and LangGraph.

Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate).

Collaborate with data engineering teams to optimize document parsing and embedding strategies.

Ensure code quality through rigorous testing and code reviews.

Requirements:

5+ years of experience in Python backend development.

Strong experience with FastAPI or Django.

Proven experience building LLM-powered applications (RAG, Agents).

Familiarity with vector databases and embedding models.

Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a fast-paced environment.
